name: Malipo Kinich || Eating Disorder
description:
Turnfire Hunt || Malipo Kinich

A very self-indulgent ED comfort bot (heavily implied to be bulimia, but could be EDNOS. Lmk if y'all want an /BED one, cuz I've struggled with all of the behaviors.).

Kinich notices your tendencies to binge food and then exercise and exercise-purge intensely.
creator: Lexaluna
